rag_rules: Use annex agree {** ... **}; in component type for assumptions/guarantees, in implementation for assignments only.
Place guarantees in component type scope only when relating visible inputs to visible outputs with concrete bounds or named constants.
Use assign only in implementation scope for existing output features or auxiliary variables.
generic_rules: Restrict AGREE expressions to identifiers explicitly visible in the current component scope.
Do not assume AADL properties are automatically accessible as variables in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Syntax: assume "label": expression; guarantee "label": expression; assign output = expression;
Use const name : type = value; and eq name : type = expression; for declarations in type scope.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not reference AADL property names (e.g., Deadline, Period) as if they are AGREE variables.
